OBJECT_TYPE: # DEFAULT rules describe what /sap-gen-abap actually emits. Stricter shop conventions (e.g. SUBROUTINE ^F_, METHOD ^M_) belong in the {custom_url}\sap_object_naming_rules.tsv override.

DESCRIPTION: Customer-namespace package
Customer-namespace program (max 40 chars per SAP)
FORM (subroutine) - any identifier; /sap-gen-abap emits unprefixed FORM names (get_data)
Function group starts with Z (industry convention)
Function module starts with Z_ (industry convention)
Global class ZCL_ / exception class ZCX_ / interface ZIF_ (industry convention)
Method - any identifier; /sap-gen-abap emits unprefixed method names (run, test_*)
Customer-namespace domain (max 30 chars per SAP)
Customer-namespace data element (max 30 chars per SAP)
Customer-namespace structure (max 30 chars per SAP)
Customer-namespace table (max 30 chars per SAP)
Customer-namespace view (max 30 chars per SAP)
Customer-namespace search help (max 30 chars per SAP)
Lock object: SAP-mandated E prefix + Z (max 30 chars)
Type group: Z + up to 7 chars = 8 total (SAP limit)
Customer-namespace table type (max 30 chars per SAP)
Message class: Z + up to 19 chars = 20 total (SAP limit)
CDS DDL source / view entity name (DDLS object, customer namespace, max 30 chars). /sap-gen-cds emits classic DEFINE VIEW on <7.55.
Generated SQL view for a classic CDS view (@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName): DDIC view name, Z + up to 15 = 16 chars max (SAP DDIC name limit).
RAP interface (root) CDS view entity: ZI_ prefix, customer namespace, max 30 chars (/sap-gen-rap).
RAP projection CDS view entity (consumption): ZC_ prefix, max 30 chars (/sap-gen-rap).
RAP behavior pool (implementation class): ZBP_ prefix, max 30 chars (/sap-gen-rap).
RAP service definition: ZUI_ prefix, max 30 chars (/sap-gen-rap).
RAP service binding (OData V2 UI): ZUI_..._O2 suffix, max 30 chars (/sap-gen-rap).
